unresolved_questions: GENIUS NY is a startup accelerator (operated by CenterState CEO, funded by Empire State Development) that invests in UAS/robotics seed-stage startups. It has no products of its own — it offers an accelerator program (funding, mentorship, office space). No UXV products exist to enumerate. The corpus confirms this: 13 fetched pages cover homepage, about, FAQ, staff, news/testimonials — no product pages at all.
